hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if (fp.endswith('.genesis.md') or fp.endswith('identity/SCHEMA.md')) else 0)"

fp=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); case "$fp" in *node_modules*) exit 0 ;; *.ts) out=$(npm run typecheck 2>&1) || { echo "$out" | tail -20 >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac
